name: Lakeborne Dweller
descriptionTemplate: Upgrade all effects when consuming {Dreamlure}: {Necropolis of Dreams} consumes 5 stacks to additionally obtain 15 Aliemus, and when consuming 10 stacks, it additionally causes 5% DMG reduction; {Spine Needle Chains} doubles the {STR} reduction effect; {Keeper of the Lost} increases the additional {Counter} amount by 50%.
